name: restaurant-kds
description: Real-time Kitchen Display System — WhatsApp ordering + thermal printing

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w dashboard"
scripts.build: npm run build -w dashboard && npm run build -w server
scripts.test: npm run test -w server && npm run test -w dashboard
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w server && npm run lint -w dashboard && npm run lint -w printer-worker
